title: Shopify and National Bank of Canada are among backers of a new digital currency built to settle trades 24/7
summary_full: Tetra Trust Company, a regulated Canadian digital asset custodian, has launched CADD, a Canadian-dollar-pegged stablecoin issued under approval from the Alberta Treasury Board and Finance, making it the first CAD stablecoin from a provincially regulated financial institution. The token is currently live on Base, Ethereum, and Tempo, with reserves held in trust under Canadian law and ring-fenced for redemption, addressing a structural gap in domestic blockchain-based settlement where USD-denominated stablecoins have filled the void by default.
